name: Bailey's Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine crumbs and sugar in a bowl. Stir in butter until crumbly.
3. Press mixture into the bottom and up the sides of an ungreased springform pan.
4. Bake for 7 minutes.
5. FILLING
2 1/2 lbs CREAM CHEESE, at room temperature
2-3/4 cups SUGAR
5 EGGS, at room temperature
1 cup BAILEY'S IRISH CREAM
1 tablespoon VANILLA EXTRACT
1 cup CHOCOLATE CHIP COOKIES
6. Combine all filling ingredients in a large bowl until smooth.
7. Pour the mixture over the baked crust and spread evenly.
8. Refrigerate for several hours or overnight to set completely.
